column1: A virulent plague has broken out on \x80. The disease has the potential to kill millions. Scientists need to research to find a cure.
column2: \x80爆發了致命瘟疫,這場疾病可能奪走數百萬條性命。科學家需要投入研究才能找到解藥。

column1: The plague continues on \x80. \x81 million colonists died last year. Scientists believe that they are \x82 research points away from a cure.
column2: \x80的瘟疫仍在蔓延,去年有 \x81 百萬殖民者喪生。科學家認為,距離研發出解藥還差 \x82 點研究。

column1: Scientists have found the cure for the plague on \x80. The pestilence will finally end.
column2: 科學家已找到 \x80 瘟疫的解藥,這場疫病終於要結束了。

column1: A virulent plague has struck the \x84 colony on \x80. Millions of colonists fear for their lives.
column2: 致命瘟疫襲擊了 \x80 上的 \x84 殖民地,數百萬殖民者性命堪憂。

column1: \x84 scientists finally found a cure for the \x80 plague. The pestilence will finally end.
column2: \x84 的科學家終於找到了 \x80 瘟疫的解藥,這場疫病終於要結束了。

column1: A violent quake hit the colony on \x80 killing \x81 million colonists and destroying \x82 factories.
column2: 劇烈地震襲擊了 \x80 的殖民地,造成 \x81 百萬殖民者死亡,並摧毀了 \x82 座工廠。

column1: A violent quake hit the \x84 colony on \x80 killing \x81 million colonists and destroying \x82 factories.
column2: 劇烈地震襲擊了 \x80 上的 \x84 殖民地,造成 \x81 百萬殖民者死亡,並摧毀了 \x82 座工廠。

column1: Scientists predict that the star in the \x80 system will go super nova within \x81 year\x83. If a research solution cannot be found, the colony will be destroyed.
column2: 科學家預測 \x80 星系的恆星將在 \x81 年內發生超新星爆發。若無法研究出對策,該殖民地將被摧毀。

column1: Only \x81 year\x83 remain\x8d before the \x80 star goes super nova. Scientists still need \x82 research points to find a solution.
column2: 距離 \x80 的恆星發生超新星爆發只剩 \x81 年。科學家還需要 \x82 點研究才能找到對策。

column1: Scientists on \x80 have developed a solar rejuvenator thus ending the threat of their star going super nova.
column2: \x80 的科學家已研發出恆星再生器,化解了恆星發生超新星爆發的威脅。

column1: The star in \x80 has gone super nova, destroying most of the planet and killing millions.
column2: \x80 的恆星已發生超新星爆發,摧毀了大半個行星,數百萬人喪生。

column1: \x84 scientists are predicting that their star in the \x80 system will soon go super nova.
column2: \x84 的科學家預測 \x80 星系的恆星即將發生超新星爆發。

column1: \x84 scientists managed to save the \x80 colony by inventing and using a solar rejuvenator on the star's core.
column2: \x84 的科學家發明並對恆星核心使用了恆星再生器,成功拯救了 \x80 殖民地。

column1: The star \x80 has gone super nova destroying most of the \x84 colony and killing millions.
column2: \x80 的恆星已發生超新星爆發,摧毀了大半個 \x84 殖民地,數百萬人喪生。

column1: A major industrial accident on \x80 has irradiated the entire planet. The intense radiation levels threaten to kill millions unless cleaned up.
column2: \x80 發生重大工業事故,使整顆行星遭到輻射汙染。若不加以清理,強烈的輻射將奪走數百萬條性命。

column1: The radiation from the industrial accident on \x80 has been cleaned up, but the ecology has already been badly damaged.
column2: \x80 工業事故造成的輻射已清理完畢,但生態已遭受嚴重破壞。

column1: A major industrial accident on the \x84 colony of \x80 has irradiated the entire planet. The intense pollution levels will certainly kill millions.
column2: \x80 上的 \x84 殖民地發生重大工業事故,使整顆行星遭到輻射汙染。如此嚴重的汙染必將奪走數百萬條性命。

column1: The radiation from the \x84 industrial accident on \x80 has been finally cleaned up.
column2: \x80 上 \x84 工業事故造成的輻射終於清理完畢。

column1: Without sanction the \x84 ambassador attempted to assassinate emperor \x8c and failed. His motives are unclear, but personal revenge may have been involved.
column2: \x84 的大使未經授權企圖暗殺 \x8c 皇帝,但以失敗收場。其動機不明,但可能涉及私人恩怨。

column1: An insidious computer virus struck the main \x86 research network destroying \x82 research points. It may take years to recover from the loss.
column2: 一種陰險的電腦病毒侵襲了 \x86 主研究網路,摧毀了 \x82 點研究。要從這場損失中恢復,恐怕需要數年之久。

column1: An insidious computer virus struck the \x84 main \x86 research network destroying \x82 research points. It may take years to recover from the loss.
column2: 一種陰險的電腦病毒侵襲了 \x84 的 \x86 主研究網路,摧毀了 \x82 點研究。要從這場損失中恢復,恐怕需要數年之久。

column1: Astronomers predict that a comet will collide with the \x80 colony within \x81 year\x83. Unless the star fleet can destroy the comet, the colony will be destroyed.
column2: 天文學家預測一顆彗星將在 \x81 年內撞上 \x80 殖民地。除非星際艦隊能摧毀這顆彗星,否則殖民地將被毀滅。

column1: Our fleet has destroyed \x82 percent of the comet due to strike our colony on \x80 in \x81 year\x83.
column2: 我方艦隊已摧毀了那顆即將在 \x81 年內撞擊 \x80 殖民地的彗星 \x82%。

column1: Our glorious star fleet has destroyed the comet that threatened the \x80 system.
column2: 我方光榮的星際艦隊已摧毀了威脅 \x80 星系的彗星。

column1: The dreaded comet has utterly destroyed the \x80 colony.
column2: 那顆可怕的彗星已徹底摧毀了 \x80 殖民地。

column1: \x84 astronomers predict that a comet will collide with the \x80 colony within \x81 year\x83. Unless their star fleet can destroy the comet, the colony will be destroyed.
column2: \x84 的天文學家預測一顆彗星將在 \x81 年內撞上 \x80 殖民地。除非其星際艦隊能摧毀這顆彗星,否則殖民地將被毀滅。

column1: The \x84 star fleet managed to destroy the comet threatening the \x80 system before it could inflict damage on their colony.
column2: \x84 的星際艦隊在彗星傷及其殖民地之前,成功摧毀了威脅 \x80 星系的彗星。

column1: The dreaded comet has utterly destroyed the \x84 \x80 colony.
column2: 那顆可怕的彗星已徹底摧毀了 \x84 的 \x80 殖民地。

column1: Pirates based in the \x80 star system have begun disrupting trade routes. More ships are needed to patrol the area if the pirates are to be stopped.
column2: 以 \x80 星系為據點的海盜開始擾亂貿易航線。若要阻止海盜,需要更多艦船巡邏該區域。

column1: Pirate activity in the \x80 system reduced annual trade revenues by \x81 percent last year. Merchants are demanding more ships to patrol the area.
column2: \x80 星系的海盜活動使去年的年度貿易收入減少了 \x81%。商人們要求派出更多艦船巡邏該區域。

column1: Pirate activity in the \x80 star system has been eliminated.
column2: \x80 星系的海盜活動已被肅清。

column1: Pirates based in the \x80 star system have begun raiding and disrupting \x84 trade routes.
column2: 以 \x80 星系為據點的海盜開始劫掠並擾亂 \x84 的貿易航線。

column1: The \x84 fleet has managed to erradicate the pirates plaguing their trade.
column2: \x84 的艦隊成功剿滅了肆虐其貿易的海盜。

column1: \x84 scouts discovered an ancient derelict from which their scientists uncovered numerous weapon and shield technological secrets.
column2: \x84 的偵察兵發現了一艘古老的廢棄船艦,其科學家從中破解了大量武器與護盾的科技祕密。

column1: \x80 has rebelled and refuses to contribute to the empire. At least \x81 million rebels control the colony. Troops must be sent to quell the uprising.
column2: \x80 發生叛亂,拒絕對帝國作出貢獻。至少有 \x81 百萬名叛軍控制著殖民地。必須派遣部隊鎮壓這場起義。

column1: \x80 has joined the rebellion, refusing to contribute to the empire. Rebel forces number at least \x81 million troops .
column2: \x80 加入了叛亂,拒絕對帝國作出貢獻。叛軍兵力至少有 \x81 百萬人。

column1: \x84 troops have vanquished the rebel forces controlling \x80.
column2: \x84 的部隊已擊潰了控制 \x80 的叛軍。

column1: \x80 has rebelled and refuses to contribute to the \x84 empire. At least \x81 million rebels control the colony.
column2: \x80 發生叛亂,拒絕對 \x84 帝國作出貢獻。至少有 \x81 百萬名叛軍控制著殖民地。

column1: \x80 has joined the \x84 rebellion, refusing to contribute to the empire. Rebel forces number at least \x81 million troops .
column2: \x80 加入了 \x84 的叛亂,拒絕對帝國作出貢獻。叛軍兵力至少有 \x81 百萬人。

column1: Long range scanners have begun tracking a crystal life form traveling at warp speed into our galaxy.
column2: 遠程掃描器開始追蹤到一個以曲速駛入我方銀河的水晶生命體。

column1: The \x84 star fleet has finally destroyed the Space Crystal that was threatening the entire galaxy.
column2: \x84 的星際艦隊終於摧毀了那個威脅整個銀河的太空水晶。

column1: For some inexplicable reason the Space Crystal has left our galaxy.
column2: 出於某種無法解釋的原因,太空水晶離開了我方銀河。

column1: The Space Crystal has killed millions of colonists on \x80. The colony structures have remained intact but all of the colonists have disappeared.
column2: 太空水晶在 \x80 上殺害了數百萬殖民者。殖民地的建築完好無損,但所有殖民者都消失了。

column1: The Space Crystal has killed millions of colonists on \x80 destroying the \x84 empire.

column2: 光榮的 \x84 艦隊迎戰並摧毀了肆虐銀河的外星太空變形蟲。

column1: For some inexplicable reason the Space Amoeba has left our galaxy.
column2: 出於某種無法解釋的原因,太空變形蟲離開了我方銀河。

column2: 太空變形蟲徹底摧毀了 \x80 星系。這個世界只剩下一具遭輻射汙染、毫無生機的殘骸。

column1: The Space Amoeba has killed millions on \x80 destroying the \x84 empire.

column2: \x84 的 \x80 殖民地行星軸突然偏移,使環境戲劇性地改善。

column1: Deep mining operations on \x80 have discovered substantial deposits of neutronium making the planet a rich source for development.
column2: \x80 的深層採礦作業發現了大量中子素礦藏,使這顆行星成為開發的富礦來源。

column2: \x84 的 \x80 殖民地深層採礦作業發現了大量中子素礦藏,使這顆行星成為開發的富礦來源。

column1: A wealthy merchant has decided to support the \x84 cause with a substantial contribution of \x81 BC.

column2: \x80 的重金屬已枯竭,使這顆行星淪為礦產貧瘠之地。

column1: The heavy metals on the \x84 colony \x80 have been depleted to the point of rendering the planet mineral poor.

column1: The \x84s have conquered Orion and claimed the throne world in the name of Emperor \x8c.
column2: \x84 已征服 Orion,並以 \x8c 皇帝之名宣告佔有這座王座之星。

column1: A new leader emerged from within the \x84 empire. Rumors indicate the new emperor is a\x8e\x88 \x89. Relations have become neutral and trade has been disrupted.
column2: \x84 帝國內部冒出一位新領袖。傳聞新皇帝是一位 \x88 族的 \x89。雙方關係轉為中立,貿易也已中斷。

column1: The \x84 empire has gone into revolt. Rumors indicate the new emperor is a\x8e\x88 \x89. Relations shifted toward neutrality and trade has been disrupted.
column2: \x84 帝國爆發叛變。傳聞新皇帝是一位 \x88 族的 \x89。雙方關係轉向中立,貿易也已中斷。

column1: Civil war has erupted throughout the \x84 empire. Rebels have stormed the imperial palace, slaying Emperor \x8c mercilessly.
column2: \x84 帝國全境爆發內戰。叛軍攻入了皇宮,殘忍地殺害了 \x8c 皇帝。

column1: The \x84 empire has grown in strength. Already they control \x81 star systems.
column2: \x84 帝國日益壯大,如今已控制了 \x81 個星系。

column1: The \x84 empire now spans \x81 star systems outstripping all the other races.
column2: \x84 帝國如今橫跨 \x81 個星系,凌駕於所有其他種族之上。

column1: The \x84 empire now numbers \x81 star systems. If their expansion is not contained they will soon control the galaxy.
column2: \x84 帝國如今坐擁 \x81 個星系。若不加以遏制,他們很快就會掌控整個銀河。

column1: The \x84 empire nearly controls a majority of the galaxy. Leaders are already preparing to merge with the mighty empire.
column2: \x84 帝國已幾乎掌控了銀河的大部分。各方領袖已準備投靠這個強大的帝國。

column1: With the destruction of the last \x84 colony, \x8c was slain and the imperial palace was completely obliterated.
column2: 隨著最後一座 \x84 殖民地被摧毀,\x8c 遭到殺害,皇宮也被徹底夷平。
